title: Strive says digital credit selloff was a liquidation event, not a credit crisis
summary: A sharp selloff in digital credit products exposed growing pains in a young market, a Strive executive argues the underlying credit fundamentals remain intact.

title: Ether’s biggest corporate holders back new Ethereum research hub
summary: Ethlabs was formed with support from SharpLink, Bitmine and Consensys CEO Joe Lubin as the network's development is expanding beyond the Ethereum Foundation.

title: Ethereum Foundation talent exodus sparks fresh debate over leadership
summary: The Ethereum community is once again debating the future of the foundation after co-executive director Hsiao-Wei Wang announced she would step down.

title: Crypto's second U.S. lobbying front — tax policy — sees industry push on mining, staking
summary: The crypto sector's leading U.S. advocacy groups asked the U.S. House's tax committee to advance a bill to clarify treatment of assets from mining and staking.

title: Anchorage aims to bring banks onchain with new tokenized deposit platform
summary: The crypto bank aims to help financial institutions offer round-the-clock payments and settlement without replacing their core systems.
